sprint: Creator Reconciliation Sprint — Phase 1: The Render Tree Becomes Creator's Object Model
task: Builder's own existing layer.permissions {moveable,editable,visible} now flows through Scene convergence onto the compiled theme.layerPack, into a new uniform Scene Object shape every render-tree entry carries regardless of origin (owner + moveable/editable, via a shared _sceneObject() normalizer in renderer/slideRenderer.js), into Object Strip (now a pure render-tree reader, no more direct SceneEngine queries or de-dup hack) and Context Panel (asks the selected object's own capability before type-routing, closing a real misleading-UX bug where selecting a World-owned object opened a live-looking but id-blind generic editor). Additive and backward-compatible throughout -- every pre-sprint theme keeps its exact prior locked behaviour. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
